name_en: Exclusive Real Shot M13324 Yellow Flower Dynamic Code 2025 Cruise Early Spring Series Reinterpreting the classic Noé handbag, adding a new member to the Trunk family. The Monogram Reverse canvas body features a dazzling woven chain, with leather corners and drawstring closure continuing iconic details, allowing for both hand-carry and crossbody to recreate runway looks. 23.0 x 27.0 x 8.0 cm (L x H x W)
name_cn:
Exclusive Real Shot M13324 Yellow Flower Dynamic Code 2025 Cruise Early Spring Series Reinterpreting the classic Noé handbag, adding a new member to the Trunk family. The Monogram Reverse canvas body features a dazzling woven chain, with leather corners and drawstring closure continuing iconic details, allowing for both hand-carry and crossbody to recreate runway looks. 23.0 x 27.0 x 8.0 cm (L x H x W)
	•	Monogram Reverse pattern
	•	Monogram canvas
	•	Calfskin trim
	•	Fabric lining
	•	Metalware
	•	Drawstring closure
	•	Shoulder strap: Detachable, adjustable
	•	Strap half-length: 53.0 cm
	•	Strap half-length adjustable to: 63.0 cm
	•	Chain: Detachable
	•	Chain half-length: 30.0 cm
